<!-- Thanks for contributing to align-first. Fill this in so review is fast. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what failure does it prevent or fix? -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Change to an existing skill
- [ ] Docs / meta (README, CONTRIBUTING, CI, …)
- [ ] Fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) — no AI attribution trailers
- [ ] Skill changes keep the `SKILL.md` frontmatter valid (`name`, `description` starting with "Use when…")
- [ ] Skill stays portable / harness-agnostic (or is explicitly tool-specific)
- [ ] I described the concrete agent failure this prevents
- [ ] CI (`validate-skills`) passes
